criteria_met: Consignor 'Fortex International AB' matches invoice issuer 'Fortex International AB' exactly.
Consignee 'Al Ekhlas for Industry Import & Export' matches invoice CUSTOMER 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' after normalization.
Order reference '59483 / 59483B' in certificate matches ORDER NO '59483 / 59483B' in invoice.
pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met. The document pair is valid.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 27, SE-411 16, GOTHENBURG, Sweden
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files and pages.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'Fortex International AB' found exactly in invoice header (page 1) and footer (page 2, 'FORTEX INTERNATIONAL AB').
MATCH – Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice header states 'Gothenburg, Sweden'. VAT prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice.
Indirect land verification via VAT prefix SE.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Fortex International AB' at 'Vallgatan 27, SE-411 16, GOTHENBURG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer is 'Fortex International AB' at 'Vallgatan 27, 411 16 Gothenburg, Sweden'. The company name matches exactly after normalization. The address matches (SE- prefix in postcode is a minor formatting difference). Country is Sweden in both documents, confirmed also by VAT prefix SE. Direct MATCH via 4.1.0 and 4.1.2.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Consignor 'Fortex International AB' is exactly identified as the invoice issuer. Address and country (Sweden) match. VAT prefix SE confirms the Swedish registration.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Al Ekhlas for Industry Import & Export, Obour City Plot 12, Block 20027, Qalubia, Cairo, Egypt
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT, Obour City Plot 12, Block 20027, Qalubia, Cairo, Egypt

comparison_steps.description: Check invoice CUSTOMER field for consignee.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' matches certificate consignee after normalization (& ↔ AND, case).

comparison_steps.description: Also confirmed in CONSIGNED TO field.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' identical to CUSTOMER.
MATCH – Certificate states 'Egypt'. Invoice CUSTOMER and CONSIGNED TO both state 'Egypt'.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – CUSTOMER field used as primary billing/consignee field.

evidence.raw_text: AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT, Obour City Plot 12, Block 20027, Qalubia, Cairo, Egypt
AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT, Obour City Plot 12, Block 20027, Qalubia, Cairo, Egypt

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Al Ekhlas for Industry Import & Export' at Obour City Plot 12, Block 20027, Qalubia, Cairo, Egypt. Invoice CUSTOMER field: 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' at same address. After normalization (case: al ekhlas for industry import and export ↔ al ekhlas for industry import and export; '&' treated as equivalent to 'AND'), the names are identical. Address and country (Egypt) match exactly. CONSIGNED TO field confirms the same party. MATCH per 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.3.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Consignee 'Al Ekhlas for Industry Import & Export' matches invoice CUSTOMER 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' after normalization of case and & vs AND. Address and country (Egypt) match exactly.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value:
Fortex 59483 / 59483B, Made in Sweden
88 reels Folding Box Board - DG
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Fortex 59483 / 59483B, Made in Sweden (shipping marks); FOLDING BOX BOARD - DG (description across all rows); Total Unit Count: 88 Reels

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (59483/59483B are order/reference numbers, not product article numbers). Proceed to Priority 2.
Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate: 'Folding Box Board - DG'. Search in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'FOLDING BOX BOARD - DG' found in every description row of the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate mentions '88 reels' and 'Fortex 59483 / 59483B, Made in Sweden'. Invoice shipping marks: 'Fortex 59483 / 59483B, Made in Sweden'. Invoice total: '88 Reels'. These are non-identity-bearing additions that match.
comparison_steps.result: Consistent – additional details confirm same shipment.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'Folding Box Board - DG' identified in both documents.
Non-identity-bearing additions (reels count, shipping marks) do not affect product identity and are consistent.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: '88 reels Folding Box Board - DG'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Folding Box Board - DG'. Invoice contains 'FOLDING BOX BOARD - DG' in every product row. After case normalization, the identity-bearing designation matches exactly. The certificate also states '88 reels', which matches invoice's 'Total Unit Count: 88 Reels'. Shipping marks 'Fortex 59483 / 59483B, Made in Sweden' are identical in both documents. MATCH per 4.3.3.
checkpoint_results.motivation: The identity-bearing main designation 'Folding Box Board - DG' in the certificate matches 'FOLDING BOX BOARD - DG' in the invoice exactly after case normalization. Additional details (88 reels, shipping marks) are consistent.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 states '217.508 mt'. This is the verification-basis quantity.

comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice page 2 states 'Total Weight Quantity: 217.508 MT'. Exact numeric and unit match.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states '217.508 mt' without explicit GW/NW category. Invoice states 'Total Weight Quantity: 217.508 MT' also without explicit GW/NW category. Only one weight value in each document.
comparison_steps.result: Per 4.4.2.2 rule 2: single weight value without category, value matches, no conflicting alternative weight → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check – numeric value 217.508 and unit MT found exactly in invoice.
Box 7 value '217.508 mt' used as verification-basis quantity.
Single weight value without explicit GW/NW category – value matches and no conflicting alternative weight exists → MATCH.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '217.508 mt'. Invoice page 2 states 'Total Weight Quantity: 217.508 MT'. The numeric value 217.508 matches exactly. The unit MT matches exactly. Neither document specifies GW/NW category, but only one weight value is given in each — per 4.4.2.2 rule 2, this yields MATCH since no conflicting alternative weight exists. No summation or conversion needed.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate quantity 217.508 MT matches invoice 'Total Weight Quantity: 217.508 MT' exactly. Single weight value without GW/NW category in both documents; no conflicting alternative.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Invoice page 1 contains 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'SWEDEN'. After case normalization: both are 'sweden'.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field in invoice.

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden' as country of origin. Invoice page 1 has an explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. After case normalization, both resolve to 'sweden'. Exact match. No mixed origins, no EU normalization needed. MATCH per 4.5.1 and 4.5.4.
checkpoint_results.motivation: Certificate origin 'Sweden' matches invoice 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' exactly after case normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT_APPLICABLE – No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Scanned certificate for LC/L/C/Letter of Credit/Documentary Credit references. None found. Certificate number 'SEG-23D-786283' does not contain LC-related terms.

rule_evaluation_log.result: VALID – Document A (page 1) is certificate. Document B (pages 1-2) is the separate invoice file. Certificate file also contains embedded invoice pages (pages 2-3), but per rule 8.5.0, verification uses the separate invoice file (Document B).
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Certificate file contains the COO on page 1 and embedded invoice pages on pages 2-3. Invoice file (Document B) contains the same invoice as a separate file. Verification is conducted against Document B per rule 8.5.0.

rule_evaluation_log.result: VALID – Consignor matches invoice issuer, consignee matches CUSTOMER, order reference matches.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – 'Fortex International AB' found in invoice header and footer.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Exact match of company name in invoice issuer block.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden (header address). Confirmed by VAT prefix SE.

rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – Consignee identified in CUSTOMER field.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Invoice CUSTOMER field contains 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' which matches certificate consignee after normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – 'Folding Box Board - DG' identified in invoice.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Identity-bearing main designation matches exactly after case normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – 217.508 MT found in invoice total.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Invoice 'Total Weight Quantity: 217.508 MT' matches certificate box 7 '217.508 mt' exactly.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Weight category check – single value without GW/NW
rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – Rule 2 applied: single weight value, no conflicting alternative.
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Neither document specifies GW/NW. Only one total weight value in each. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, this is MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.result: MATCH – Explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field found.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Fortex International AB, mottagaren Al Ekhlas for Industry Import & Export, varubeskrivningen Folding Box Board - DG, kvantiteten 217.508 MT och ursprungslandet Sverige kan alla verifieras exakt i fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) are verified as MATCH. The certificate and invoice form a consistent and valid document pair.
non_blocking_notes: Certificate file also contains embedded copies of the invoice (pages 2-3). Verification was conducted against the separate invoice file (Document B) per rule 8.5.0.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor namn identifierat exakt i fakturans utställarblock. Landverifiering (4.1.2) – Sverige bekräftat via adress och VAT-prefix SE.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Fortex International AB' återfinns exakt som fakturans utställare. Adress och land (Sverige) överensstämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Prioritetsordning 4.2.0.2 – CUSTOMER-fält har prioritet. Normalisering (4.2.2.1) – versaler/gemener, & ↔ AND. Landverifiering (4.2.3) – Egypten.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Al Ekhlas for Industry Import & Export' matchar fakturans CUSTOMER 'AL EKHLAS FOR INDUSTRY IMPORT&EXPORT' efter normalisering av versaler och &/AND. Adress och land (Egypten) överensstämmer exakt.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Folding Box Board - DG' identifierad exakt i fakturan. Icke-identitetsbärande tillägg (4.3.4) konsistenta.
sections.motivation: Produktbeteckningen 'Folding Box Board - DG' matchar fakturans 'FOLDING BOX BOARD - DG' exakt efter normalisering av versaler. Antal rullar (88) och shipping marks överensstämmer.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) – numeriskt värde och enhet identifierade exakt i fakturan. Viktkategori (4.4.2.2 punkt 2) – enda viktvärde utan GW/NW, inget motstridigt alternativ.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets kvantitet 217.508 MT matchar fakturans 'Total Weight Quantity: 217.508 MT' exakt. Enda viktvärdet i båda dokumenten utan motstridigt alternativ.

sections.rule_applied: Identifiering via explicit ursprungsfält (4.5.1). Normalisering av versaler (4.5.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Sweden' matchar fakturans 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' exakt efter normalisering av versaler.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints evaluated as MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. No MISMATCH found. Confidence floor (0.85) met for all checkpoints.
